hero.name: Raafid
hero.description: A software engineer focused on turning ideas into products. I enjoy building and shipping across web, app, AI, automation, and data-driven systems.

about.heading: Building practical software across full-stack, backend, automation, and data-driven systems.
about.paragraph: I'm an Integrated M.Tech Software Engineering student at VIT, focused on building practical software through full-stack apps, backend APIs, automation tools, and data-driven systems. I like turning ideas into usable products and improving them through clean code, debugging, and continuous learning.

highlights.title: Full-Stack Development
highlights.text: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, and database-backed apps.

highlights.title: Backend Engineering
highlights.text: REST APIs, authentication, database design, and business logic.

highlights.title: Automation & Testing
highlights.text: Workflow automation, visual regression testing, and CI/CD pipelines.

highlights.title: Data & Systems
highlights.text: Kafka pipelines, C++ systems projects, and IoT prototypes.

contact.heading: Let's connect and build something meaningful.

projects.title: Automated Outreach Pipeline
projects.description: Node.js outreach pipeline that discovers companies, enriches verified emails, and safely sends outreach through real providers.

projects.title: LeadFlow CRM
projects.description: Full-stack lead management CRM with CRUD, search, filters, pagination, status tracking, and backend APIs.

projects.title: StockLock
projects.description: Inventory reservation system with atomic stock locking, idempotent checkout, countdown reservations, and expiry handling.

projects.title: GitScope API
projects.description: REST API that analyzes GitHub profiles, repositories, stars, forks, languages, and stores insights in MySQL.

projects.title: HR Workflow Designer
projects.description: Visual no-code HR workflow builder with drag-and-drop nodes, dynamic forms, validation, and workflow simulation.

projects.title: Campus Priority Notification System
projects.description: React TypeScript notification dashboard with protected API usage, viewed-state tracking, priority inbox, and logging middleware.

projects.title: Worker Attendance & Overtime Settlement Engine
projects.description: Spring Boot backend for worker attendance, overtime calculation, settlement, and site management.

projects.title: DevOps Release Tracker API
projects.description: Spring Boot API for releases, deployment tasks, rollback flow, audit logs, JWT authentication, and Swagger docs.

projects.title: FamCare
projects.description: Spring Boot and Thymeleaf-based family care management system with server-side rendered workflows and role-based features.

projects.title: BackstopJS Visual Testing API
projects.description: Express API that accepts screenshots, runs BackstopJS comparison, and returns pass/fail results with diff images.

projects.title: OSSVEL Tiles
projects.description: Frontend implementation for a live tiles business website with responsive layouts, product-focused sections, and clean production UI.

projects.title: Mindora
projects.description: Mental health chatbot system focused on supportive conversations and wellness-oriented user interaction.

projects.title: SportsFiesta
projects.description: Sports event website with responsive pages, event sections, and clean UI presentation.

projects.title: CineMatch
projects.description: Movie discovery interface focused on entertainment browsing and simple recommendation-style UI.

projects.title: Lost Pixel Visual Test
projects.description: Visual regression testing demo that compares UI screenshots and detects layout changes across builds.

projects.title: AI Workflow Builder
projects.description: No-code AI workflow builder for configurable AI automation flows with document processing and workflow execution.

projects.title: End-to-End Data Engineering Pipeline
projects.description: Data engineering pipeline covering ingestion, streaming, processing, and storage using modern data tools.

projects.title: GeoBoundary Align
projects.description: Geospatial boundary alignment solution that corrects misaligned land plot polygons using satellite imagery, boundary raster hints, shift search, confidence scoring, and GeoJSON outputs.

projects.title: Real-Time Stock Analysis Pipeline
projects.description: Real-time stock market data pipeline using Kafka, Python, and AWS services for storage and querying.

projects.title: Financial News Sentiment Analysis
projects.description: NLP project for classifying financial news sentiment and analyzing market-related text insights.

projects.title: Insider Threat Detection
projects.description: Full-stack security monitoring system with activity tracking, risk scoring, alerts, audit logs, and admin dashboards.

projects.title: Rainfall Prediction
projects.description: Machine learning project for rainfall prediction using historical weather-related features and predictive modeling.

projects.title: Secure IoT-Based Health Monitoring System
projects.description: ESP8266 health monitoring system with heart-rate sensing, fall detection, AES-encrypted telemetry, Flask backend, and alert dashboard.

projects.title: Concurrent Key-Value Store
projects.description: C++ key-value store focused on concurrency, thread-safe operations, and low-level system design concepts.

projects.title: Linux System Monitor
projects.description: C++ system monitoring tool for tracking Linux runtime metrics and resource information.

projects.title: Linux Diagnostics Tool
projects.description: Linux diagnostics utility for inspecting system-level information and troubleshooting runtime environment details.

projects.title: CPU Cache Simulator
projects.description: C++ simulator that demonstrates CPU cache behavior, memory access patterns, and cache performance concepts.

experience.title: Software Engineer Intern
bullets: Designed scalable backend services using Node.js and MongoDB, supporting high-concurrency SaaS workflows and database-backed modules.
Delivered frontend and backend features across multiple SaaS modules, working from implementation to deployment with structured API workflows.
Optimized database queries and API logic, improving average response time and overall application performance.
Collaborated in an Agile-style workflow with regular deliverables, debugging, testing, and code improvements.

education.description: Focused on software engineering fundamentals, backend development, databases, operating systems, computer networks, cloud computing, software testing, and full-stack project development.
Completed higher secondary education with a strong foundation in mathematics, science, and problem-solving.

achievements.description: Secured first place in the Tamil Nadu regional round.

achievements.title: Senior Core Member
